title: Up to Rp214,700

merchant_editorial:
Ankhusa is a restaurant inspired by Balinese wisdom and nature where guests can experience the best Indonesian cuisine in Bali. Ankhusa originated in Ganesha’s weapon, became a symbol of prosperity and fertility for over the years by locals. The mythology then inspired us to named the restaurant.

Located in Ubud with breathtaking views of lush greenery jungle and rice fields, the restaurant offers a romantic experience like no other places. Ankhusa presents itself with Balinese architecture and fully decorated with bamboo as well as wood under meticulous craftsmanship for truly Balinese ambiance. As an all-day dining restaurant, it has also semi-outdoor decoration overlooking the lush jungle above a local river. The menu, which has an array of Indonesian food is designed to give optimal nutrition for the guest aimed to nurture the body with an array of local cuisine signatures.

As an upscale restaurant, Ankhusa strives to serve authentic Indonesian menus for your best gastronomic venture. Enjoy the finest flavour of the Indonesian Indulgence such as Gule Itek, Deconstructed Rawon, Ikan Arsik, Tauco Brownies, Kriuk-Kriuk and many more. This food consists of traditional local ingredients and spices made with passion by our professional chef. All of the food ready for all-day dining, just right off Ubud's natural beauty.

merchant_editorial: Chow is a vibrant South Vietnamese restaurant in Darwin Waterfront Precinct. They offer a variety of colorful and tasty dishes using fresh, local produce. The cool and casual restaurant is perfect for a meal or a drink, with a covered patio. Their full a la carte service is recommended for groups, and the quick service lunch menu is perfect for busy workers. But for visitors to Darwin, there's no need to rush. Take your time and enjoy a cocktail while you savor the delicious flavors of South East Asia. Don't miss their expertly made cocktails and award-winning cocktail bar. Reservations are highly recommended, and it's a must-visit for anyone looking for a fun and tasty dining experience in Darwin. Winner of the 2021 "Golden Bowl" in the Darwin Laksa Festival.

merchant_editorial:
"Welcome to Nirvana Restaurant, where you will be taken on a culinary journey to the exotic lands of Thailand, India, and Malaysia.

Since 1995, Nirvana has been serving up amazing dishes to the locals of Darwin, and the pre-Cyclone Tracy building has been a part of Darwin's restaurant history since the 1960s.

Step inside and let the sumptuous and eclectic décor take you on a journey to another world. Nirvana Restaurant is a multi-room venue that features a cocktail bar, intimate booths for couples, a private function room, and an al fresco decking area. When searching restaurants near me you will always find a Darwin Restaurant to choose, but make sure you look out for this one.



The impressive wine selection will complement your meal perfectly, and if you're feeling adventurous, their creative cocktails will help to tame the spice of the delicious cuisine."
